raw_consumer_statement: I purchased a headlight from XXXX for {$190.00} and received a defective light. I reached out to the seller to notify them of the defective light and how I could return the item or replace it for a new one. The seller did not accept my request to replace the or return the item, they offered me a {$20.00} refund in which I refuse. I reached out to citi bank to file a dispute regarding the defective light I received from the merchant. Citi did their investigation and closed the case stating the claim ruled in the merchant favor because I did not return the item. I told citibank that I have screen shot of convocation between the merchant and I where I offered to return the defective item and was not given the opportunity to because the merchant did not provide any return information for me to do so. I spoke to a citi dispute personnel who told me they would reopen the case and send me an email platform where I can submit my supporting documents. I was told that I would receive the email in XXXX hours. It has been XXXX  days and I have received an email or have gotten any information about my claim.
